rule_value: If game starts within 48h of originally scheduled start resolve on official final result else last fair market price
notes: Imported from user research doc and mapped to full-game moneyline handling.

rule_value: Postponed game started within 48h remains open and resolves on official final result else last fair market price
notes: Use originally scheduled start time as the 48h anchor.

rule_value: Suspended or abandoned game resumed within 48h stays open else resolves at last fair market price
notes: Same 48h window applies to resumed games.

rule_value: Use governing body official-game declaration with a winner rather than a hardcoded innings threshold
notes: Research import says early endings resolve on official result if the league declares the game official.

rule_value: Full-game markets include regulation plus extra innings unless contract text explicitly excludes them
Current MLBGAME terms contain no explicit pitcher-change carveout so do not import sportsbook pitcher-action defaults
notes: Verified against the current official baseball contract terms which enumerate other contingencies but not pitcher changes.

rule_value: N/A for moneyline contract
Use first official final result before expiration and fall back to last fair market price when outcome remains unresolved
notes: Covers called games and uncompleted periods described in contract terms.
